## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Risk Check
- [ ] No real secrets, dumps, logs or generated diagnostics were committed
- [ ] Protected routes and webhooks were reviewed if touched
- [ ] Environment variable changes were documented in `apps/portal-backend/.env.example`
